title: It's a Trap
content:

"'''It's a Trap'''" is a [[Star Wars (comic strip)|comic strip]] written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and illustrated by [[Al Williamson]]. It was published by the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]] from November [[1982]] to January [[1983]]. It has also been posted online on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]]. The comic documents several events, including [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] and the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] joining the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] taking command of his recently built [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]], [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']].

==Development==
The story introduced the character of Admiral Ackbar and the Mon Calamari species. At the time the strip was created, [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] was still in production. The story ended about four months before the film's release.<ref name="Year by Year">''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, Updated and Expanded Edition]]''</ref>

{{Quote|Beginning tomorrow! A special new adventure introducing Admiral Ackbar, soon to be featured in the next film of the Star Wars saga... Revenge of the Jedi!|Comic panel caption from "Iceworld"|<ref name="Iceworld">"[[Iceworld]]"</ref>}}

[[File:Iceword - Revenge of the Jedi teaser.jpg|250px|thumb|"Iceworld" panel teasing the story]]
Though the story originally had no official title, fans began calling it "Revenge of the Jedi" based on a misreading of the teaser for the story printed in the comic strip's previous installment.<ref name="Iceworld" /> That text was only making reference to the fact that Ackbar was in that upcoming film. ''Revenge of the Jedi'' was a working title of the third installment of the [[Original trilogy|original ''Star Wars'' trilogy]], used very late into the promotion of the film.<ref name="TCNC Vol 3">''[[Star Wars: The Classic Newspaper Comics Vol. 3]]''</ref>

When the story was reprinted in ''[[Star Wars: The Classic Newspaper Comics Vol. 3]]'' in [[2018]], it was finally named "It's a Trap," in honor of Admiral Ackbar's famous line in ''Return of the Jedi''.<ref name="TCNC Vol 3" /> Though months later in [[2019]], ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Newspaper Strips Vol. 2]]'' did refer to the story simply as "Untitled."<ref name="Epic Newspaper Vol 2">''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Newspaper Strips Vol. 2]]''</ref> The publisher's summary of the 2018 collection did mention the story "Revenge of the Jedi" but the book itself used the new title.
